labels.ja: 注入とコンテンツ汚染防御

definitions.zh: 注入与内容投毒防御是以威胁信号为关键概念的本体边界；ThreatSignal、PoisonedContent、InjectionSignature、PatternScan、DetectionActivity、DefenseFinding 和严重度。 其成员归属遵循：当对象的身份由注入或投毒检测、指令冲突的安全判定、污点传播或针对该威胁的缓解决定时，在此拥有。
definitions.en: Injection and content-poisoning defense is the ontology boundary anchored by the key notion threat signal; ThreatSignal, PoisonedContent, InjectionSignature, PatternScan, DetectionActivity, DefenseFinding, and severity. Membership follows: Own an object when its identity is determined by injection or poisoning detection, security judgment of instruction conflict, taint propagation, or mitigation of that threat.
definitions.ja: 注入とコンテンツ汚染防御は脅威信号を主要概念とするオントロジー境界です。ThreatSignal、PoisonedContent、InjectionSignature、PatternScan、DetectionActivity、DefenseFinding、severity。 所属判定は次に従います：対象の同一性が注入・汚染検出、指示競合の安全判断、taint propagation、または脅威緩和で決まる場合に所有します。

purpose.zh: 识别不可信内容中的提示注入、指令冲突和数据投毒，传播污点并实施可验证缓解。
purpose.en: Detect prompt injection, instruction conflict, and data poisoning in untrusted content, propagate taint, and apply verifiable mitigation.
purpose.ja: 不信内容のプロンプト注入、指示競合、データ汚染を検出し、taint を伝播して検証可能な緩和を実施します。

includes.zh: ThreatSignal、PoisonedContent、InjectionSignature、PatternScan、DetectionActivity、DefenseFinding 和严重度。
includes.en: ThreatSignal, PoisonedContent, InjectionSignature, PatternScan, DetectionActivity, DefenseFinding, and severity.
includes.ja: ThreatSignal、PoisonedContent、InjectionSignature、PatternScan、DetectionActivity、DefenseFinding、severity。

includes.zh: InstructionConflict、Taint、污点传播、Mitigation、隔离、降权、拒绝和复检结果。
includes.en: InstructionConflict, Taint, taint propagation, Mitigation, quarantine, de-prioritization, refusal, and retest results.
includes.ja: InstructionConflict、Taint、taint propagation、Mitigation、隔離、優先度低下、拒否、再検査結果。

excludes.zh: PromptTemplate、PromptTemplateInstance、Instruction 权威解析归提示与指令；安全范围唯一拥有 InstructionConflict 的威胁身份。
excludes.en: PromptTemplate, PromptTemplateInstance, and ordinary instruction-authority resolution belong to prompts and instructions; this scope exclusively owns the threat identity of InstructionConflict.
excludes.ja: PromptTemplate、PromptTemplateInstance、ordinary instruction-authority resolution は prompt/instruction に属し、この scope だけが InstructionConflict threat identity を所有します。

excludes.zh: 通用内容块和来源引用归内容表示与来源定位；只有带威胁判断、污点或缓解身份的对象进入这里。
excludes.en: Generic content blocks and source references belong to content representation and sources; only objects with threat judgment, taint, or mitigation identity enter here.
excludes.ja: 一般内容ブロックと出典参照は内容表現・出典に属し、脅威判断、taint、mitigation 同一性を持つ対象だけを扱います。

description.zh: 注入与内容投毒防御的输入概念族为不可信指令候选；责任交接由已接受事实 模式扫描 —scans→ 不可信指令候选 (PatternScan-scans-UntrustedInstructionCandidate) 明确给出。
description.en: The input families for Injection and content-poisoning defense are untrusted instruction candidate; the accepted facts pattern scan —scans→ untrusted instruction candidate (PatternScan-scans-UntrustedInstructionCandidate) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 注入とコンテンツ汚染防御の入力概念族は不信頼指示候補です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 パターン走査 —scans→ 不信頼指示候補 (PatternScan-scans-UntrustedInstructionCandidate) により明示されます。

description.zh: 注入与内容投毒防御的输出概念族为注入扫描结果、防御发现；责任交接由已接受事实 模式扫描 —produces→ 注入扫描结果 (PatternScan-produces-InjectionScanResult)；注入扫描结果 —supports→ 防御发现 (InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding) 明确给出。
description.en: The output families for Injection and content-poisoning defense are injection scan result, defense finding; the accepted facts pattern scan —produces→ injection scan result (PatternScan-produces-InjectionScanResult); injection scan result —supports→ defense finding (InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 注入とコンテンツ汚染防御の出力概念族は注入走査結果、防御所見です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 パターン走査 —produces→ 注入走査結果 (PatternScan-produces-InjectionScanResult)；注入走査結果 —supports→ 防御所見 (InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding) により明示されます。

description.zh: 注入与内容投毒防御的失败概念族为持久上下文风险、受污染内容；责任交接由已接受事实 威胁信号 —indicates→ 持久上下文风险 (ThreatSignal-indicates-PersistentContextRisk)；资源内容投毒 —affects→ 受污染内容 (ResourceContentPoisoning-affects-PoisonedContent) 明确给出。
description.en: The failure families for Injection and content-poisoning defense are persistent context risk, poisoned content; the accepted facts threat signal —indicates→ persistent context risk (ThreatSignal-indicates-PersistentContextRisk); resource content poisoning —affects→ poisoned content (ResourceContentPoisoning-affects-PoisonedContent) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 注入とコンテンツ汚染防御の失敗概念族は永続コンテキストリスク、汚染内容です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 脅威信号 —indicates→ 永続コンテキストリスク (ThreatSignal-indicates-PersistentContextRisk)；リソース内容汚染 —affects→ 汚染内容 (ResourceContentPoisoning-affects-PoisonedContent) により明示されます。

description.zh: 注入与内容投毒防御的恢复概念族为缓解活动、可信指令覆盖；责任交接由已接受事实 缓解活动 —addresses→ 防御发现 (MitigationAction-addresses-DefenseFinding)；指令冲突 —resolved_by→ 可信指令覆盖 (InstructionConflict-resolved_by-TrustedInstructionOverride) 明确给出。
description.en: The recovery families for Injection and content-poisoning defense are mitigation action, trusted instruction override; the accepted facts mitigation action —addresses→ defense finding (MitigationAction-addresses-DefenseFinding); instruction conflict —resolved_by→ trusted instruction override (InstructionConflict-resolved_by-TrustedInstructionOverride) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 注入とコンテンツ汚染防御の回復概念族は緩和活動、信頼済み指示上書きです。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 緩和活動 —addresses→ 防御所見 (MitigationAction-addresses-DefenseFinding)；指示衝突 —resolved_by→ 信頼済み指示上書き (InstructionConflict-resolved_by-TrustedInstructionOverride) により明示されます。

decision_note.zh: 注入与内容投毒防御与提示与指令按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Injection and content-poisoning defense and Prompts and instructions are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 注入とコンテンツ汚染防御とプロンプトと指示は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

labels.zh: 某段内容为何被标记为 Taint，污点从哪个来源经哪些转换传播到当前对象？：正例
labels.en: Why was content marked with Taint, and from which source through which transformations did taint reach the current object?: positive case
labels.ja: 内容が Taint とされた理由と、どの出典からどの変換を経て現在対象へ伝播したかを示せますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例以 模式扫描、来源附件、受污染内容、文档加载能力 作边界比较；问题“某段内容为何被标记为 Taint，污点从哪个来源经哪些转换传播到当前对象？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
descriptions.en: The positive case compares pattern scan, source attachment, poisoned content, document loader at the ownership boundary. The question “Why was content marked with Taint, and from which source through which transformations did taint reach the current object?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.
descriptions.ja: 正例は パターン走査、出典添付、汚染内容、文書読込能力 を所有境界で比較します。質問「内容が Taint とされた理由と、どの出典からどの変換を経て現在対象へ伝播したかを示せますか。」は関連オントロジーを境界対照として使いますが、その読みに根拠を与える承認済みの非分類モジュール間関係は canonical グラフにありません。そのため例証は双方の候補概念を並置し、実行時の受け渡しを主張しません。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Every taint mark reaches cited threat evidence through declared propagation rules; proximity alone does not propagate taint.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Every taint mark reaches cited threat evidence through declared propagation rules; proximity alone does not propagate taint.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Every taint mark reaches cited threat evidence through declared propagation rules; proximity alone does not propagate taint.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-openai-guardrails at Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-taint-provenance-v3 (safety-injection-defense.taint-provenance), owned by safety-injection-defense and compared with memory-ingestion. The source does not define Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-taint-provenance-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Trace Taint backward through derived_from, contains, summarizes, and transforms relations to originating ThreatSignal and source reference." and expected assertion "Every taint mark reaches cited threat evidence through declared propagation rules; proximity alone does not propagate taint." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Source eng-security-mcp-nsa-2026 at Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-taint-provenance-v3 (safety-injection-defense.taint-provenance), owned by safety-injection-defense and compared with memory-ingestion. The source does not define Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-taint-provenance-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Trace Taint backward through derived_from, contains, summarizes, and transforms relations to originating ThreatSignal and source reference." and expected assertion "Every taint mark reaches cited threat evidence through declared propagation rules; proximity alone does not propagate taint." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 某段内容为何被标记为 Taint，污点从哪个来源经哪些转换传播到当前对象？：反例
labels.en: Why was content marked with Taint, and from which source through which transformations did taint reach the current object?: counterexample
labels.ja: 内容が Taint とされた理由と、どの出典からどの変換を経て現在対象へ伝播したかを示せますか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“某段内容为何被标记为 Taint，污点从哪个来源经哪些转换传播到当前对象？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Why was content marked with Taint, and from which source through which transformations did taint reach the current object?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「内容が Taint とされた理由と、どの出典からどの変換を経て現在対象へ伝播したかを示せますか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-openai-guardrails at Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-taint-provenance-v3 (safety-injection-defense.taint-provenance), owned by safety-injection-defense and compared with memory-ingestion. The source does not define Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-taint-provenance-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Trace Taint backward through derived_from, contains, summarizes, and transforms relations to originating ThreatSignal and source reference." and expected assertion "Every taint mark reaches cited threat evidence through declared propagation rules; proximity alone does not propagate taint." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 哪些指令构成安全冲突，冲突涉及的权威、来源和潜在越权目标是什么？：正例
labels.en: Which instructions form a security conflict, and what authority, source, and attempted privilege escalation are involved?: positive case
labels.ja: どの指示が安全競合を構成し、関係する権威、出典、潜在的権限昇格目標は何ですか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：指令冲突检测活动 —detects→ 指令冲突 (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: Instruction conflict-detection activity —detects→ instruction conflict (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：指示競合検出活動 —detects→ 指示衝突 (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：A security InstructionConflict cites both instructions and a violated trust or authority constraint; ordinary precedence resolution alone is not labeled a threat.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: A security InstructionConflict cites both instructions and a violated trust or authority constraint; ordinary precedence resolution alone is not labeled a threat.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：A security InstructionConflict cites both instructions and a violated trust or authority constraint; ordinary precedence resolution alone is not labeled a threat.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-openai-guardrails at Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-instruction-conflict-v3 (safety-injection-defense.instruction-conflict), owned by safety-injection-defense and compared with info-prompts-instructions. The source does not define Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-instruction-conflict-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Compare applicable instructions, authority metadata, trust source, requested action, and policy scope to detect conflict patterns." and expected assertion "A security InstructionConflict cites both instructions and a violated trust or authority constraint; ordinary precedence resolution alone is not labeled a threat." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 隔离、降权或拒绝缓解后，威胁内容是否仍能进入上下文或影响高权威指令？：正例
labels.en: After quarantine, de-prioritization, or refusal mitigation, can threatening content still enter context or affect higher-authority instructions?: positive case
labels.ja: 隔離、優先度低下、拒否の緩和後、脅威内容はコンテキストへ入り高権威指示へ影響できますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例以 受污染内容、上下文产物、检测活动、上下文排除决定 作边界比较；问题“隔离、降权或拒绝缓解后，威胁内容是否仍能进入上下文或影响高权威指令？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
descriptions.en: The positive case compares poisoned content, context artifact, detection activity, context exclusion decision at the ownership boundary. The question “After quarantine, de-prioritization, or refusal mitigation, can threatening content still enter context or affect higher-authority instructions?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.
descriptions.ja: 正例は 汚染内容、コンテキスト情報成果物、検出活動、コンテキスト除外判断 を所有境界で比較します。質問「隔離、優先度低下、拒否の緩和後、脅威内容はコンテキストへ入り高権威指示へ影響できますか。」は関連オントロジーを境界対照として使いますが、その読みに根拠を与える承認済みの非分類モジュール間関係は canonical グラフにありません。そのため例証は双方の候補概念を並置し、実行時の受け渡しを主張しません。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Mitigated status requires no prohibited path from tainted content to protected instruction or action; residual paths keep the finding open.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Mitigated status requires no prohibited path from tainted content to protected instruction or action; residual paths keep the finding open.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Mitigated status requires no prohibited path from tainted content to protected instruction or action; residual paths keep the finding open.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-openai-guardrails at Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-mitigation-verification-v3 (safety-injection-defense.mitigation-verification), owned by safety-injection-defense and compared with memory-context. The source does not define Moonweave CQ safety-injection-defense-cq-mitigation-verification-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Re-run propagation and context-admission checks after Mitigation, inspecting residual paths to instructions and execution decisions." and expected assertion "Mitigated status requires no prohibited path from tainted content to protected instruction or action; residual paths keep the finding open." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“隔离、降权或拒绝缓解后，威胁内容是否仍能进入上下文或影响高权威指令？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “After quarantine, de-prioritization, or refusal mitigation, can threatening content still enter context or affect higher-authority instructions?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「隔離、優先度低下、拒否の緩和後、脅威内容はコンテキストへ入り高権威指示へ影響できますか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

questions.zh: 某段内容为何被标记为 Taint，污点从哪个来源经哪些转换传播到当前对象？
questions.en: Why was content marked with Taint, and from which source through which transformations did taint reach the current object?
questions.ja: 内容が Taint とされた理由と、どの出典からどの変換を経て現在対象へ伝播したかを示せますか。

competency_questions.query: Trace Taint backward through derived_from, contains, summarizes, and transforms relations to originating ThreatSignal and source reference.
competency_questions.expected_assertion: Every taint mark reaches cited threat evidence through declared propagation rules; proximity alone does not propagate taint.

decision_note.ja: safety-injection-defense の実際の三言語ラベルを値どおりに確認しました：zh="注入与内容投毒防御"; en="Injection and content-poisoning defense"; ja="注入とコンテンツ汚染防御"。purpose、境界、CQ 表現も審査し、言語審査は owner や backbone を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 注入与内容投毒防御在 v3 中完成命名、owner、交互合同、CQ 与任意深度骨架复审。
change_note.en: Injection and content-poisoning defense completed its v3 naming, ownership, interaction-contract, CQ, and arbitrary-depth-backbone review.
change_note.ja: 注入とコンテンツ汚染防御は v3 で名称、所有権、相互作用契約、CQ、任意深度バックボーンの再審査を完了しました。

owns_when.zh: 当对象的身份由注入或投毒检测、指令冲突的安全判定、污点传播或针对该威胁的缓解决定时，在此拥有。
owns_when.en: Own an object when its identity is determined by injection or poisoning detection, security judgment of instruction conflict, taint propagation, or mitigation of that threat.
owns_when.ja: 対象の同一性が注入・汚染検出、指示競合の安全判断、taint propagation、または脅威緩和で決まる場合に所有します。

references_when.zh: 提示解析、记忆接入、上下文组装或输出披露需要避开已识别威胁时，引用 Finding、Taint 和缓解状态。
references_when.en: Prompt resolution, memory ingestion, context assembly, or output disclosure references Finding, Taint, and mitigation status when avoiding an identified threat.
references_when.ja: プロンプト解析、記憶取込、コンテキスト組み立て、出力開示が識別済み脅威を避けるとき、Finding、Taint、緩和状態を参照します。

rationale.zh: 注入与内容投毒防御拥有威胁信号、InstructionConflict、Taint 和 Mitigation；提示与指令拥有普通模板、实例、权威元数据和解析结果。 本条仅记录 Instruction、InstructionConflictDetectionActivity、InstructionResolutionActivity；其 canonical owner 是提示与指令（info-prompts-instructions），因此 safety-injection-defense 在此引用这些概念。
rationale.en: Injection and content-poisoning defense own threat signals, InstructionConflict, Taint, and Mitigation; prompts and instructions own ordinary templates, instances, authority metadata, and resolution results. This record is limited to Instruction, InstructionConflictDetectionActivity, InstructionResolutionActivity; their canonical owner is Prompts and instructions (info-prompts-instructions), so safety-injection-defense references these concepts here.
rationale.ja: 注入とコンテンツ汚染防御は脅威信号、InstructionConflict、Taint、Mitigation を所有し、プロンプトと指示は通常のテンプレート、インスタンス、権威メタデータ、解析結果を所有します。 この記録は Instruction、InstructionConflictDetectionActivity、InstructionResolutionActivity だけを対象とし、canonical owner はプロンプトと指示（info-prompts-instructions）です。したがって safety-injection-defense はここでこれらを参照します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-openai-guardrails at Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used to compare safety-injection-defense with info-prompts-instructions, including Instruction, InstructionConflictDetectionActivity, InstructionResolutionActivity. The source does not define Moonweave Modules safety-injection-defense or info-prompts-instructions, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under safety-injection-defense's owns_when "Own an object when its identity is determined by injection or poisoning detection, security judgment of instruction conflict, taint propagation, or mitigation of that threat.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "If declared authority and priority resolve the case without threat evidence, it belongs to prompts and instructions; if trust violation, taint, or attack pattern is involved, it belongs to injection and content-poisoning defense."; result=references and owner=info-prompts-instructions are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

rationale.zh: 注入与污染防御拥有对摄取内容的 ThreatSignal、Taint、PoisonedContent、SourceSinkFlow 和 MitigationAction；摄取拥有资源加载、规范化、去重和来源附件。 本条仅记录 DocumentLoader、SourceAttachment；其 canonical owner 是记忆接入（memory-ingestion），因此 safety-injection-defense 在此引用这些概念。
rationale.en: Injection and poisoning defense own ThreatSignal, Taint, PoisonedContent, SourceSinkFlow, and MitigationAction over ingested content; ingestion owns resource loading, normalization, deduplication, and source attachments. This record is limited to DocumentLoader, SourceAttachment; their canonical owner is Memory ingestion (memory-ingestion), so safety-injection-defense references these concepts here.
rationale.ja: injection/poisoning defense は ingested content の ThreatSignal、Taint、PoisonedContent、SourceSinkFlow、MitigationAction を所有し、ingestion は resource loading、normalization、deduplication、source attachment を所有します。 この記録は DocumentLoader、SourceAttachment だけを対象とし、canonical owner は記憶取り込み（memory-ingestion）です。したがって safety-injection-defense はここでこれらを参照します。

relation_not_applicable_reason.zh: “注入与内容投毒防御”与“记忆接入”之间没有适用于本 owner 概念组的已接受跨模块事实；该决策只比较明确列出的候选概念，不暗示运行时交互。
relation_not_applicable_reason.en: There is no accepted cross-module fact applicable to this owner-homogeneous concept group between Injection and content-poisoning defense and Memory ingestion; the decision compares only the named candidates without implying runtime interaction.
relation_not_applicable_reason.ja: 「注入とコンテンツ汚染防御」と「記憶取り込み」の間には、この owner 単一概念群に適用できる承認済みモジュール間事実がありません。明示候補だけを比較し、実行時相互作用を示唆しません。

semantic_area.zh: 普通指令冲突解析与安全注入冲突
semantic_area.en: Ordinary instruction resolution versus security injection conflict
semantic_area.ja: 通常の指示競合解析と安全注入競合

overlap_reason.zh: 两者都比较指令权威，但普通解析解决合法指令优先级，安全冲突还需要不可信来源、越权意图或投毒证据。 本条仅记录 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity、InstructionResolution；其 canonical owner 是提示与指令（info-prompts-instructions），因此 safety-injection-defense 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Both compare instruction authority, but ordinary resolution handles legitimate precedence while a security conflict additionally requires untrusted source, privilege-escalation intent, or poisoning evidence. This record is limited to InstructionConflictDetectionActivity, InstructionResolution; their canonical owner is Prompts and instructions (info-prompts-instructions), so safety-injection-defense references these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: どちらも指示権威を比較しますが、通常解析は正当な優先順位、安全競合はさらに不信出典、越権意図、汚染証拠を必要とします。 この記録は InstructionConflictDetectionActivity、InstructionResolution だけを対象とし、canonical owner はプロンプトと指示（info-prompts-instructions）です。したがって safety-injection-defense はここでこれらを参照します。

disambiguation_test.zh: 若仅按声明权威和优先级即可解决且无威胁证据，则归提示与指令；若涉及信任违规、污点或攻击模式，则归注入与内容投毒防御。
disambiguation_test.en: If declared authority and priority resolve the case without threat evidence, it belongs to prompts and instructions; if trust violation, taint, or attack pattern is involved, it belongs to injection and content-poisoning defense.
disambiguation_test.ja: 宣言された権威と優先度だけで解決し脅威証拠がなければプロンプトと指示、信頼違反、taint、攻撃パターンがあれば注入とコンテンツ汚染防御に属します。

semantic_area.zh: 资源摄取事实与摄取内容威胁判断
semantic_area.en: Resource-ingestion fact versus threat judgment on ingested content
semantic_area.ja: resource ingestion fact と ingested content threat judgment

overlap_reason.zh: 加载不可信资源不自动证明污染，DetectionActivity 必须给出模式或流证据；隔离内容也不改变其摄取来源。 本条仅记录 DocumentLoader、SourceAttachment；其 canonical owner 是记忆接入（memory-ingestion），因此 safety-injection-defense 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Loading an untrusted resource does not prove poisoning; DetectionActivity must provide pattern or flow evidence, and quarantining content does not change ingestion provenance. This record is limited to DocumentLoader, SourceAttachment; their canonical owner is Memory ingestion (memory-ingestion), so safety-injection-defense references these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: untrusted resource loading は poisoning 証明ではなく DetectionActivity の pattern/flow evidence が必要で、quarantine も ingestion provenance を変えません。 この記録は DocumentLoader、SourceAttachment だけを対象とし、canonical owner は記憶取り込み（memory-ingestion）です。したがって safety-injection-defense はここでこれらを参照します。

disambiguation_test.zh: 由 loader、source attachment、normalization 和 ingestion run 识别的对象归摄取；由 threat signature、taint lineage、finding 和 mitigation 识别的对象归注入与污染防御。
disambiguation_test.en: An object identified by loader, source attachment, normalization, and ingestion run belongs to ingestion; one identified by threat signature, taint lineage, finding, and mitigation belongs to injection and poisoning defense.
disambiguation_test.ja: loader・source attachment・normalization・ingestion run で識別されれば ingestion、threat signature・taint lineage・finding・mitigation で識別されれば injection/poisoning defense に属します。

semantic_area.zh: 资源摄取事实与摄取内容威胁判断
semantic_area.en: Resource-ingestion fact versus threat judgment on ingested content
semantic_area.ja: resource ingestion fact と ingested content threat judgment

overlap_reason.zh: 加载不可信资源不自动证明污染，DetectionActivity 必须给出模式或流证据；隔离内容也不改变其摄取来源。 本条仅记录 PatternScan、PoisonedContent；其 canonical owner 是注入与内容投毒防御（safety-injection-defense），因此 safety-injection-defense 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Loading an untrusted resource does not prove poisoning; DetectionActivity must provide pattern or flow evidence, and quarantining content does not change ingestion provenance. This record is limited to PatternScan, PoisonedContent; their canonical owner is Injection and content-poisoning defense (safety-injection-defense), so safety-injection-defense owns these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: untrusted resource loading は poisoning 証明ではなく DetectionActivity の pattern/flow evidence が必要で、quarantine も ingestion provenance を変えません。 この記録は PatternScan、PoisonedContent だけを対象とし、canonical owner は注入とコンテンツ汚染防御（safety-injection-defense）です。したがって safety-injection-defense はここでこれらを所有します。

semantic_area.zh: 安全排除决定与普通上下文选择
semantic_area.en: Security exclusion versus ordinary context selection
semantic_area.ja: security exclusion decision と ordinary context selection

overlap_reason.zh: 内容可因 token budget 或 relevance 被排除而无安全问题；被判定有威胁的内容即使高度相关也必须受 mitigation 约束。 本条仅记录 ContextArtifact、ContextExclusion；其 canonical owner 是上下文组装（memory-context），因此 safety-injection-defense 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Content can be excluded for token budget or relevance without security concern; content judged threatening remains constrained by mitigation even if highly relevant. This record is limited to ContextArtifact, ContextExclusion; their canonical owner is Context assembly (memory-context), so safety-injection-defense references these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: content は token budget/relevance で安全問題なく除外され得て、threatening content は高 relevance でも mitigation に制約されます。 この記録は ContextArtifact、ContextExclusion だけを対象とし、canonical owner はコンテキスト組み立て（memory-context）です。したがって safety-injection-defense はここでこれらを参照します。

short_definitions.zh: 作为信息记录，防御发现由这一事实区分：它记录注入防御或污点分析产生的安全发现，在其转化为反馈指标、审查发现、阻断错误或策略决策之前保留原始语义。
short_definitions.en: Defense finding belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records a safety finding emitted by injection defense or taint analysis before it is converted into feedback metrics, review findings, blocking errors, or policy decisions.
short_definitions.ja: 防御所見は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、注入防御または汚染分析が生成した安全上の所見を記録し、それがフィードバック指標、レビュー所見、ブロッキングエラー、ポリシー判断へ変換される前の意味を保持します。

definitions.zh: 作为信息记录，防御发现由这一事实区分：它记录注入防御或污点分析产生的安全发现，在其转化为反馈指标、审查发现、阻断错误或策略决策之前保留原始语义。
definitions.en: Defense finding belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records a safety finding emitted by injection defense or taint analysis before it is converted into feedback metrics, review findings, blocking errors, or policy decisions.
definitions.ja: 防御所見は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、注入防御または汚染分析が生成した安全上の所見を記録し、それがフィードバック指標、レビュー所見、ブロッキングエラー、ポリシー判断へ変換される前の意味を保持します。

why_needed.zh: 防御发现为canonical 事实 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding（InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding）提供明确端点并保持与 InjectionScanResult 的定义边界；节点字段 finding_id、confidence、risk_score 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: defense finding provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding (InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding) while preserving its reviewed boundary from InjectionScanResult; node fields finding_id, confidence, risk_score make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: 防御所見はcanonical 事実 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding（InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding）の明確な端点を提供し、InjectionScanResult との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 finding_id、confidence、risk_score によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的防御发现：作为信息记录，防御发现由这一事实区分：它记录注入防御或污点分析产生的安全发现，在其转化为反馈指标、审查发现、阻断错误或策略决策之前保留原始语义。；该种差可由字段 finding_id、confidence、risk_score 检验。
includes.en: Includes defense finding records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Defense finding belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records a safety finding emitted by injection defense or taint analysis before it is converted into feedback metrics, review findings, blocking errors, or policy decisions. The differentia can be checked through fields finding_id, confidence, risk_score.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす防御所見を含みます：防御所見は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、注入防御または汚染分析が生成した安全上の所見を記録し、それがフィードバック指標、レビュー所見、ブロッキングエラー、ポリシー判断へ変換される前の意味を保持します。 種差は項目 finding_id、confidence、risk_score で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 注入扫描结果只是关系 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding 的另一端；相关联不表示它是防御发现。
excludes.en: InjectionScanResult is only the other endpoint of InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding; relatedness does not make it a DefenseFinding.
excludes.ja: InjectionScanResult は InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで DefenseFinding にはなりません。

definitions.zh: 表示防御发现经审查后的严重程度。
definitions.en: Represents the reviewed severity of a defense finding.
definitions.ja: 防御所見のレビュー済み重大度を表します。

definitions.en: risk level "risk critical" used to rank safety, protocol, tool, network, or data-boundary exposure.
definitions.zh: 严重风险是风险等级个体，用于表达安全、协议、工具、网络或数据边界暴露强度。
definitions.ja: 重大リスクはリスクレベル個体で、安全、プロトコル、ツール、ネットワーク、データ境界の露出強度を表します。

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将防御发现（DefenseFinding）记录为 InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“作为信息记录，防御发现由这一事实区分：它记录注入防御或污点分析产生的安全发现，在其转化为反馈指标、审查发现、阻断错误或策略决策之前保留原始语义”。记录同时写入经审查字段 risk_level="critical", finding_id="defense-finding-001", confidence=0.94, risk_score=0.88, observed_at="2026-07-13T04:10:00.000Z"。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records defense finding (DefenseFinding) as the target of InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding. Its reviewed definition is “Defense finding belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records a safety finding emitted by injection defense or taint analysis before it is converted into feedback metrics, review findings, blocking errors, or policy decisions”. The record also binds reviewed fields risk_level="critical", finding_id="defense-finding-001", confidence=0.94, risk_score=0.88, observed_at="2026-07-13T04:10:00.000Z".
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは防御所見（DefenseFinding）を InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「防御所見は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、注入防御または汚染分析が生成した安全上の所見を記録し、それがフィードバック指標、レビュー所見、ブロッキングエラー、ポリシー判断へ変換される前の意味を保持します」です。記録には審査済み項目 risk_level="critical", finding_id="defense-finding-001", confidence=0.94, risk_score=0.88, observed_at="2026-07-13T04:10:00.000Z" も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 DefenseFinding 以及方向保持不变的事实 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding。
expected_result.en: The run can query DefenseFinding together with direction-preserving fact InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding.
expected_result.ja: この実行では DefenseFinding と方向を保持した事実 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: InjectionScanResult 用作DefenseFinding的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 InjectionScanResult 的已审查定义是“注入扫描结果是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它记录对内容进行注入或污点风险扫描的结果，包括匹配信号、受影响片段、来源、置信度、策略决策以及已知的下游接收方。”。不能因 relation InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding 而把它归入DefenseFinding。
descriptions.en: InjectionScanResult is the boundary contrast for DefenseFinding. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but InjectionScanResult's reviewed definition is “Injection scan result is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it records the result of scanning content for injection or taint risk, including matched signal, affected span, source, confidence, policy decision, and downstream sink if known.”. relation InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding does not make it a DefenseFinding.
descriptions.ja: InjectionScanResult は DefenseFinding の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、InjectionScanResult の審査済み定義は「注入走査結果は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：注入スキャン結果は、内容に対する注入または汚染リスクのスキャン結果を記録し、一致した信号、影響範囲、出典、信頼度、ポリシー判断、既知の下流受信先を含みます。」です。relation InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding だけで DefenseFinding にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: InjectionScanResult 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DefenseFinding。
expected_result.en: InjectionScanResult retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DefenseFinding from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: InjectionScanResult は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DefenseFinding へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 DefenseFinding（防御发现）由 safety-injection-defense 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由注入或投毒检测、指令冲突的安全判定、污点传播或针对该威胁的缓解决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms DefenseFinding (defense finding) is owned by safety-injection-defense for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by injection or poisoning detection, security judgment of instruction conflict, taint propagation, or mitigation of that threat.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は DefenseFinding（防御所見）を safety-injection-defense が「対象の同一性が注入・汚染検出、指示競合の安全判断、taint propagation、または脅威緩和で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 DefenseFinding 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms DefenseFinding has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は DefenseFinding の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: DefenseFinding 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for DefenseFinding were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: DefenseFinding の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 防御发现已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: defense finding was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 防御所見は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 检测活动是由识别的检测器在给定时间对内容、消息、工具输出、schema、记忆或传播路径执行检查的活动，具有输入对象、检测方法、配置版本和执行上下文，并产生独立的扫描结果或发现；结果不是活动子类。
short_definitions.en: As an activity, Detection activity is distinguished by the fact that it is performed by an identified detector at a stated time over content, messages, tool output, schemas, memory, or propagation paths.
short_definitions.ja: 活動に属する検出活動は、次の事実を種差とします：DetectionActivity は識別された検出器が明示時刻に内容・メッセージ・ツール出力・schema・記憶・伝播経路へ行う検査活動で、入力対象・方法・構成版・実行文脈を持ち、独立した走査結果・所見を生成します。

definitions.zh: 检测活动是由识别的检测器在给定时间对内容、消息、工具输出、schema、记忆或传播路径执行检查的活动，具有输入对象、检测方法、配置版本和执行上下文，并产生独立的扫描结果或发现；结果不是活动子类。
definitions.en: As an activity, Detection activity is distinguished by the fact that it is performed by an identified detector at a stated time over content, messages, tool output, schemas, memory, or propagation paths. It has an input subject, method, configuration version, and execution context and produces separate scan results or findings; those results are not activity subtypes.
definitions.ja: 活動に属する検出活動は、次の事実を種差とします：DetectionActivity は識別された検出器が明示時刻に内容・メッセージ・ツール出力・schema・記憶・伝播経路へ行う検査活動で、入力対象・方法・構成版・実行文脈を持ち、独立した走査結果・所見を生成します。 結果は活動下位型ではありません。

why_needed.zh: 检测活动为canonical 事实 PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity（PatternScan is_a DetectionActivity）提供明确端点并保持与 PatternScan 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: detection activity provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity (PatternScan is_a DetectionActivity) while preserving its reviewed boundary from PatternScan.
why_needed.ja: 検出活動はcanonical 事実 PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity（PatternScan is_a DetectionActivity）の明確な端点を提供し、PatternScan との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的检测活动：检测活动是由识别的检测器在给定时间对内容、消息、工具输出、schema、记忆或传播路径执行检查的活动，具有输入对象、检测方法、配置版本和执行上下文，并产生独立的扫描结果或发现；结果不是活动子类。；该种差可由关系 PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes detection activity records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As an activity, Detection activity is distinguished by the fact that it is performed by an identified detector at a stated time over content, messages, tool output, schemas, memory, or propagation paths. It has an input subject, method, configuration version, and execution context and produces separate scan results or findings; those results are not activity subtypes. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす検出活動を含みます：活動に属する検出活動は、次の事実を種差とします：DetectionActivity は識別された検出器が明示時刻に内容・メッセージ・ツール出力・schema・記憶・伝播経路へ行う検査活動で、入力対象・方法・構成版・実行文脈を持ち、独立した走査結果・所見を生成します。 結果は活動下位型ではありません。 種差は関係 PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 模式扫描只是关系 PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity 的另一端；相关联不表示它是检测活动。
excludes.en: PatternScan is only the other endpoint of PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity; relatedness does not make it a DetectionActivity.
excludes.ja: PatternScan は PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで DetectionActivity にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将检测活动（DetectionActivity）记录为 PatternScan is_a DetectionActivity 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“检测活动是由识别的检测器在给定时间对内容、消息、工具输出、schema、记忆或传播路径执行检查的活动，具有输入对象、检测方法、配置版本和执行上下文，并产生独立的扫描结果或发现；结果不是活动子类”。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records detection activity (DetectionActivity) as the target of PatternScan is_a DetectionActivity. Its reviewed definition is “As an activity, Detection activity is distinguished by the fact that it is performed by an identified detector at a stated time over content, messages, tool output, schemas, memory, or propagation paths. It has an input subject, method, configuration version, and execution context and produces separate scan results or findings; those results are not activity subtypes”.
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは検出活動（DetectionActivity）を PatternScan is_a DetectionActivity の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「活動に属する検出活動は、次の事実を種差とします：DetectionActivity は識別された検出器が明示時刻に内容・メッセージ・ツール出力・schema・記憶・伝播経路へ行う検査活動で、入力対象・方法・構成版・実行文脈を持ち、独立した走査結果・所見を生成します。 結果は活動下位型ではありません」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 DetectionActivity 以及方向保持不变的事实 PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity。
expected_result.en: The run can query DetectionActivity together with direction-preserving fact PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity.
expected_result.ja: この実行では DetectionActivity と方向を保持した事実 PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: PatternScan 用作DetectionActivity的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 PatternScan 的已审查定义是“模式扫描是一种检测活动（DetectionActivity），检查消息、检索分块、工具结果或其他不可信内容中的注入签名（InjectionSignature）指标或策略违规，并产出注入扫描结果（InjectionScanResult）。”。不能因 relation PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity 而把它归入DetectionActivity。
descriptions.en: PatternScan is the boundary contrast for DetectionActivity. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but PatternScan's reviewed definition is “A PatternScan is a DetectionActivity that examines messages, retrieved chunks, tool results, or other untrusted content for InjectionSignature indicators or policy violations and produces an InjectionScanResult.”. relation PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity does not make it a DetectionActivity.
descriptions.ja: PatternScan は DetectionActivity の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、PatternScan の審査済み定義は「パターン走査は検出活動（DetectionActivity）の一種で、メッセージ、検索チャンク、ツール結果、その他の未信頼コンテンツにある注入シグネチャ（InjectionSignature）の兆候またはポリシー違反を検査し、注入スキャン結果（InjectionScanResult）を生成します。」です。relation PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity だけで DetectionActivity にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: PatternScan 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DetectionActivity。
expected_result.en: PatternScan retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DetectionActivity from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: PatternScan は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DetectionActivity へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、PatternScan-is_a-DetectionActivity の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 DetectionActivity（检测活动）由 safety-injection-defense 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由注入或投毒检测、指令冲突的安全判定、污点传播或针对该威胁的缓解决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms DetectionActivity (detection activity) is owned by safety-injection-defense for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by injection or poisoning detection, security judgment of instruction conflict, taint propagation, or mitigation of that threat.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は DetectionActivity（検出活動）を safety-injection-defense が「対象の同一性が注入・汚染検出、指示競合の安全判断、taint propagation、または脅威緩和で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 DetectionActivity 的 semantic kind 为 activity，主父或骨架为 reviewed root composition-root，并满足“semantic kind=activity；backbone=root_status=composition-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms DetectionActivity has semantic kind activity, primary parent or backbone reviewed root composition-root, and invariants “semantic kind=activity; backbone=root_status=composition-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は DetectionActivity の semantic kind が activity、主親または骨格が reviewed root composition-root であり、「semantic kind=activity、backbone=root_status=composition-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: DetectionActivity 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for DetectionActivity were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: DetectionActivity の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 检测活动已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: detection activity was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 検出活動は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 间接注入信号是以如下事实为区分特征的威胁信号：它记录不可信外部内容在被检索、总结、持久化到记忆、作为工具观测或经协议转换之后仍能影响智能体行为的证据。
short_definitions.en: Indirect injection signal is a threat signal; its differentiating condition is that it records evidence that untrusted external content can influence agent behavior after retrieval, summarization, memory persistence, tool observation, or protocol translation.
short_definitions.ja: 間接注入信号は脅威信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、不信頼の外部コンテンツが検索、要約、メモリ永続化、ツール観測、プロトコル変換の後にエージェント行動へ影響し得る証拠を記録します。

definitions.zh: 间接注入信号是以如下事实为区分特征的威胁信号：它记录不可信外部内容在被检索、总结、持久化到记忆、作为工具观测或经协议转换之后仍能影响智能体行为的证据。
definitions.en: Indirect injection signal is a threat signal; its differentiating condition is that it records evidence that untrusted external content can influence agent behavior after retrieval, summarization, memory persistence, tool observation, or protocol translation.
definitions.ja: 間接注入信号は脅威信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、不信頼の外部コンテンツが検索、要約、メモリ永続化、ツール観測、プロトコル変換の後にエージェント行動へ影響し得る証拠を記録します。

why_needed.zh: 间接注入信号为canonical 事实 IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal（IndirectInjectionSignal is_a ThreatSignal）提供明确端点并保持与 MemoryPoisoningSignal 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: indirect injection signal provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal (IndirectInjectionSignal is_a ThreatSignal) while preserving its reviewed boundary from MemoryPoisoningSignal.
why_needed.ja: 間接注入信号はcanonical 事実 IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal（IndirectInjectionSignal is_a ThreatSignal）の明確な端点を提供し、MemoryPoisoningSignal との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的间接注入信号：间接注入信号是以如下事实为区分特征的威胁信号：它记录不可信外部内容在被检索、总结、持久化到记忆、作为工具观测或经协议转换之后仍能影响智能体行为的证据。；该种差可由关系 IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes indirect injection signal records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Indirect injection signal is a threat signal; its differentiating condition is that it records evidence that untrusted external content can influence agent behavior after retrieval, summarization, memory persistence, tool observation, or protocol translation. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす間接注入信号を含みます：間接注入信号は脅威信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、不信頼の外部コンテンツが検索、要約、メモリ永続化、ツール観測、プロトコル変換の後にエージェント行動へ影響し得る証拠を記録します。 種差は関係 IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 记忆投毒信号虽与本概念同属 ThreatSignal，但其定义为“作为威胁信号，记忆投毒信号由这一事实区分：它记录持久记忆、检索分块、索引、摘要或长期上下文中可能包含用于破坏后续智能体行为的指令或数据的证据。”，不得替代间接注入信号。
excludes.en: MemoryPoisoningSignal shares parent ThreatSignal, but its reviewed definition is “Memory poisoning signal belongs to the threat signal category and differs from broader members in that it records evidence that persistent memory, retrieved chunks, indexes, summaries, or long-term context may contain instructions or data intended to corrupt later agent behavior.”; it must not be substituted for IndirectInjectionSignal.
excludes.ja: MemoryPoisoningSignal は同じ上位 ThreatSignal を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「メモリ汚染信号は脅威信号として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、永続メモリ、検索チャンク、インデックス、要約、長期コンテキストに、後続のエージェント行動を壊す意図の指示またはデータが含まれる可能性の証拠を記録します。」であり、IndirectInjectionSignal の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: MemoryPoisoningSignal 用作IndirectInjectionSignal的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 MemoryPoisoningSignal 的已审查定义是“作为威胁信号，记忆投毒信号由这一事实区分：它记录持久记忆、检索分块、索引、摘要或长期上下文中可能包含用于破坏后续智能体行为的指令或数据的证据。”。不能因 shared parent ThreatSignal 而把它归入IndirectInjectionSignal。
descriptions.en: MemoryPoisoningSignal is the boundary contrast for IndirectInjectionSignal. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but MemoryPoisoningSignal's reviewed definition is “Memory poisoning signal belongs to the threat signal category and differs from broader members in that it records evidence that persistent memory, retrieved chunks, indexes, summaries, or long-term context may contain instructions or data intended to corrupt later agent behavior.”. shared parent ThreatSignal does not make it a IndirectInjectionSignal.
descriptions.ja: MemoryPoisoningSignal は IndirectInjectionSignal の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、MemoryPoisoningSignal の審査済み定義は「メモリ汚染信号は脅威信号として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、永続メモリ、検索チャンク、インデックス、要約、長期コンテキストに、後続のエージェント行動を壊す意図の指示またはデータが含まれる可能性の証拠を記録します。」です。shared parent ThreatSignal だけで IndirectInjectionSignal にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: MemoryPoisoningSignal 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 IndirectInjectionSignal。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 IndirectInjectionSignal（间接注入信号）由 safety-injection-defense 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由注入或投毒检测、指令冲突的安全判定、污点传播或针对该威胁的缓解决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms IndirectInjectionSignal (indirect injection signal) is owned by safety-injection-defense for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by injection or poisoning detection, security judgment of instruction conflict, taint propagation, or mitigation of that threat.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は IndirectInjectionSignal（間接注入信号）を safety-injection-defense が「対象の同一性が注入・汚染検出、指示競合の安全判断、taint propagation、または脅威緩和で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 IndirectInjectionSignal 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms IndirectInjectionSignal has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は IndirectInjectionSignal の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

differentia.zh: 端点特定对照：父节点 ThreatSignal：IndirectInjectionSignal（semantic kind=information，骨架 IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal）；MemoryPoisoningSignal（semantic kind=information，骨架 MemoryPoisoningSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal）。双端条件：IndirectInjectionSignal 条件：“间接注入信号是以如下事实为区分特征的威胁信号：它记录不可信外部内容在被检索、总结、持久化到记忆、作为工具观测或经协议转换之后仍能影响智能体行为的证据”；MemoryPoisoningSignal 条件：“作为威胁信号，记忆投毒信号由这一事实区分：它记录持久记忆、检索分块、索引、摘要或长期上下文中可能包含用于破坏后续智能体行为的指令或数据的证据”。条件不得互借；各自成立后方可归类。
differentia.en: Endpoint-specific contrast: parent ThreatSignal: IndirectInjectionSignal (semantic kind=information, backbone IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal); MemoryPoisoningSignal (semantic kind=information, backbone MemoryPoisoningSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal). Endpoint conditions: IndirectInjectionSignal condition: “Indirect injection signal is a threat signal; its differentiating condition is that it records evidence that untrusted external content can influence agent behavior after retrieval, summarization, memory persistence, tool observation, or protocol translation”; MemoryPoisoningSignal condition: “Memory poisoning signal belongs to the threat signal category and differs from broader members in that it records evidence that persistent memory, retrieved chunks, indexes, summaries, or long-term context may contain instructions or data intended to corrupt later agent behavior”. Conditions cannot be borrowed; classify each endpoint only from its own evidence.
differentia.ja: 端点別対照：親 ThreatSignal：IndirectInjectionSignal（semantic kind=information、バックボーン IndirectInjectionSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal）；MemoryPoisoningSignal（semantic kind=information、バックボーン MemoryPoisoningSignal-is_a-ThreatSignal）。両端条件：IndirectInjectionSignal の条件：「間接注入信号は脅威信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、不信頼の外部コンテンツが検索、要約、メモリ永続化、ツール観測、プロトコル変換の後にエージェント行動へ影響し得る証拠を記録します」；MemoryPoisoningSignal の条件：「メモリ汚染信号は脅威信号として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、永続メモリ、検索チャンク、インデックス、要約、長期コンテキストに、後続のエージェント行動を壊す意図の指示またはデータが含まれる可能性の証拠を記録します」。条件を流用せず、各端を固有の証拠で分類します。

short_definitions.zh: 注入扫描结果是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它记录对内容进行注入或污点风险扫描的结果，包括匹配信号、受影响片段、来源、置信度、策略决策以及已知的下游接收方。
short_definitions.en: Injection scan result is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it records the result of scanning content for injection or taint risk, including matched signal, affected span, source, confidence, policy decision, and downstream sink if known.
short_definitions.ja: 注入走査結果は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：注入スキャン結果は、内容に対する注入または汚染リスクのスキャン結果を記録し、一致した信号、影響範囲、出典、信頼度、ポリシー判断、既知の下流受信先を含みます。

definitions.zh: 注入扫描结果是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它记录对内容进行注入或污点风险扫描的结果，包括匹配信号、受影响片段、来源、置信度、策略决策以及已知的下游接收方。
definitions.en: Injection scan result is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it records the result of scanning content for injection or taint risk, including matched signal, affected span, source, confidence, policy decision, and downstream sink if known.
definitions.ja: 注入走査結果は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：注入スキャン結果は、内容に対する注入または汚染リスクのスキャン結果を記録し、一致した信号、影響範囲、出典、信頼度、ポリシー判断、既知の下流受信先を含みます。

why_needed.zh: 注入扫描结果为canonical 事实 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding（InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding）提供明确端点并保持与 DefenseFinding 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: injection scan result provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding (InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding) while preserving its reviewed boundary from DefenseFinding.
why_needed.ja: 注入走査結果はcanonical 事実 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding（InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding）の明確な端点を提供し、DefenseFinding との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的注入扫描结果：注入扫描结果是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它记录对内容进行注入或污点风险扫描的结果，包括匹配信号、受影响片段、来源、置信度、策略决策以及已知的下游接收方。；该种差可由关系 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes injection scan result records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Injection scan result is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it records the result of scanning content for injection or taint risk, including matched signal, affected span, source, confidence, policy decision, and downstream sink if known. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす注入走査結果を含みます：注入走査結果は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：注入スキャン結果は、内容に対する注入または汚染リスクのスキャン結果を記録し、一致した信号、影響範囲、出典、信頼度、ポリシー判断、既知の下流受信先を含みます。 種差は関係 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 防御发现只是关系 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding 的另一端；相关联不表示它是注入扫描结果。
excludes.en: DefenseFinding is only the other endpoint of InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding; relatedness does not make it a InjectionScanResult.
excludes.ja: DefenseFinding は InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで InjectionScanResult にはなりません。

labels.en: Positive example of injection scan result

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将注入扫描结果（InjectionScanResult）记录为 InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding 的源端点。其已审查定义是“注入扫描结果是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它记录对内容进行注入或污点风险扫描的结果，包括匹配信号、受影响片段、来源、置信度、策略决策以及已知的下游接收方”。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records injection scan result (InjectionScanResult) as the source of InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding. Its reviewed definition is “Injection scan result is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it records the result of scanning content for injection or taint risk, including matched signal, affected span, source, confidence, policy decision, and downstream sink if known”.
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは注入走査結果（InjectionScanResult）を InjectionScanResult supports DefenseFinding の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「注入走査結果は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：注入スキャン結果は、内容に対する注入または汚染リスクのスキャン結果を記録し、一致した信号、影響範囲、出典、信頼度、ポリシー判断、既知の下流受信先を含みます」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 InjectionScanResult 以及方向保持不变的事实 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding。
expected_result.en: The run can query InjectionScanResult together with direction-preserving fact InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding.
expected_result.ja: この実行では InjectionScanResult と方向を保持した事実 InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.ja: 注入走査結果の境界例

descriptions.zh: DefenseFinding 用作InjectionScanResult的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DefenseFinding 的已审查定义是“作为信息记录，防御发现由这一事实区分：它记录注入防御或污点分析产生的安全发现，在其转化为反馈指标、审查发现、阻断错误或策略决策之前保留原始语义。”。不能因 relation InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding 而把它归入InjectionScanResult。
descriptions.en: DefenseFinding is the boundary contrast for InjectionScanResult. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DefenseFinding's reviewed definition is “Defense finding belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records a safety finding emitted by injection defense or taint analysis before it is converted into feedback metrics, review findings, blocking errors, or policy decisions.”. relation InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding does not make it a InjectionScanResult.
descriptions.ja: DefenseFinding は InjectionScanResult の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DefenseFinding の審査済み定義は「防御所見は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、注入防御または汚染分析が生成した安全上の所見を記録し、それがフィードバック指標、レビュー所見、ブロッキングエラー、ポリシー判断へ変換される前の意味を保持します。」です。relation InjectionScanResult-supports-DefenseFinding だけで InjectionScanResult にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DefenseFinding 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 InjectionScanResult。
expected_result.en: DefenseFinding retains its own type; validation must not promote it to InjectionScanResult from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DefenseFinding は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで InjectionScanResult へ昇格してはなりません。

differentia.zh: 正向身份比较：父节点 PatternScan：InjectionScanResult（semantic kind=information，骨架 PatternScan-produces-InjectionScanResult）；InjectionSignature（semantic kind=specification，骨架 scans_for_signature）。双端条件：InjectionScanResult 条件：“注入扫描结果是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它记录对内容进行注入或污点风险扫描的结果，包括匹配信号、受影响片段、来源、置信度、策略决策以及已知的下游接收方”；InjectionSignature 条件：“注入特征规范是一种规范，定义用于识别提示注入、工具流操纵或恶意指令传播的检测模式，并作为 scans_for_signature 关系的检测目标”。仅依据各自定义与骨架逐端验证。
differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent PatternScan: InjectionScanResult (semantic kind=information, backbone PatternScan-produces-InjectionScanResult); InjectionSignature (semantic kind=specification, backbone scans_for_signature). Endpoint conditions: InjectionScanResult condition: “Injection scan result is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it records the result of scanning content for injection or taint risk, including matched signal, affected span, source, confidence, policy decision, and downstream sink if known”; InjectionSignature condition: “An Injection signature specification is a specification that defines a detection pattern for indicators of prompt injection, tool-stream manipulation, or malicious instruction propagation and serves as the target of scans_for_signature”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 PatternScan：InjectionScanResult（semantic kind=information、バックボーン PatternScan-produces-InjectionScanResult）；InjectionSignature（semantic kind=specification、バックボーン scans_for_signature）。両端条件：InjectionScanResult の条件：「注入走査結果は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：注入スキャン結果は、内容に対する注入または汚染リスクのスキャン結果を記録し、一致した信号、影響範囲、出典、信頼度、ポリシー判断、既知の下流受信先を含みます」；InjectionSignature の条件：「注入シグネチャ仕様は仕様の一種で、プロンプトインジェクション、ツールストリーム操作、または悪意ある指示伝播を識別する検出パターンを定義し、scans_for_signature 関係の検出対象となります」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

short_definitions.zh: 注入特征规范是一种规范，定义用于识别提示注入、工具流操纵或恶意指令传播的检测模式，并作为 scans_for_signature 关系的检测目标。
short_definitions.en: An Injection signature specification is a specification that defines a detection pattern for indicators of prompt injection, tool-stream manipulation, or malicious instruction propagation and serves as the target of scans_for_signature.
short_definitions.ja: 注入シグネチャ仕様は仕様の一種で、プロンプトインジェクション、ツールストリーム操作、または悪意ある指示伝播を識別する検出パターンを定義し、scans_for_signature 関係の検出対象となります。

definitions.zh: 注入特征规范是一种规范，定义用于识别提示注入、工具流操纵或恶意指令传播的检测模式，并作为 scans_for_signature 关系的检测目标。
definitions.en: An Injection signature specification is a specification that defines a detection pattern for indicators of prompt injection, tool-stream manipulation, or malicious instruction propagation and serves as the target of scans_for_signature.
definitions.ja: 注入シグネチャ仕様は仕様の一種で、プロンプトインジェクション、ツールストリーム操作、または悪意ある指示伝播を識別する検出パターンを定義し、scans_for_signature 関係の検出対象となります。

why_needed.zh: 注入特征规范为canonical 事实 scans_for_signature（PatternScan scans_for_signature InjectionSignature）提供明确端点并保持与 PatternScan 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: injection signature specification provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact scans_for_signature (PatternScan scans_for_signature InjectionSignature) while preserving its reviewed boundary from PatternScan.
why_needed.ja: 注入シグネチャ仕様はcanonical 事実 scans_for_signature（PatternScan scans_for_signature InjectionSignature）の明確な端点を提供し、PatternScan との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的注入特征规范：注入特征规范是一种规范，定义用于识别提示注入、工具流操纵或恶意指令传播的检测模式，并作为 scans_for_signature 关系的检测目标。；该种差可由关系 scans_for_signature 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes injection signature specification records satisfying this reviewed differentia: An Injection signature specification is a specification that defines a detection pattern for indicators of prompt injection, tool-stream manipulation, or malicious instruction propagation and serves as the target of scans_for_signature. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in scans_for_signature.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす注入シグネチャ仕様を含みます：注入シグネチャ仕様は仕様の一種で、プロンプトインジェクション、ツールストリーム操作、または悪意ある指示伝播を識別する検出パターンを定義し、scans_for_signature 関係の検出対象となります。 種差は関係 scans_for_signature の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 模式扫描只是关系 scans_for_signature 的另一端；相关联不表示它是注入特征规范。
excludes.en: PatternScan is only the other endpoint of scans_for_signature; relatedness does not make it a InjectionSignature.
excludes.ja: PatternScan は scans_for_signature のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで InjectionSignature にはなりません。

labels.en: Positive example of injection signature specification
labels.ja: 注入シグネチャ仕様の正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将注入特征规范（InjectionSignature）记录为 PatternScan scans_for_signature InjectionSignature 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“注入特征规范是一种规范，定义用于识别提示注入、工具流操纵或恶意指令传播的检测模式，并作为 scans_for_signature 关系的检测目标”。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records injection signature specification (InjectionSignature) as the target of PatternScan scans_for_signature InjectionSignature. Its reviewed definition is “An Injection signature specification is a specification that defines a detection pattern for indicators of prompt injection, tool-stream manipulation, or malicious instruction propagation and serves as the target of scans_for_signature”.
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは注入シグネチャ仕様（InjectionSignature）を PatternScan scans_for_signature InjectionSignature の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「注入シグネチャ仕様は仕様の一種で、プロンプトインジェクション、ツールストリーム操作、または悪意ある指示伝播を識別する検出パターンを定義し、scans_for_signature 関係の検出対象となります」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 InjectionSignature 以及方向保持不变的事实 scans_for_signature。
expected_result.en: The run can query InjectionSignature together with direction-preserving fact scans_for_signature.
expected_result.ja: この実行では InjectionSignature と方向を保持した事実 scans_for_signature を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、scans_for_signature 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of scans_for_signature, the concept definition, and available field values.

labels.en: Boundary case for injection signature specification
labels.ja: 注入シグネチャ仕様の境界例

descriptions.zh: PatternScan 用作InjectionSignature的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 PatternScan 的已审查定义是“模式扫描是一种检测活动（DetectionActivity），检查消息、检索分块、工具结果或其他不可信内容中的注入签名（InjectionSignature）指标或策略违规，并产出注入扫描结果（InjectionScanResult）。”。不能因 relation scans_for_signature 而把它归入InjectionSignature。
descriptions.en: PatternScan is the boundary contrast for InjectionSignature. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but PatternScan's reviewed definition is “A PatternScan is a DetectionActivity that examines messages, retrieved chunks, tool results, or other untrusted content for InjectionSignature indicators or policy violations and produces an InjectionScanResult.”. relation scans_for_signature does not make it a InjectionSignature.
descriptions.ja: PatternScan は InjectionSignature の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、PatternScan の審査済み定義は「パターン走査は検出活動（DetectionActivity）の一種で、メッセージ、検索チャンク、ツール結果、その他の未信頼コンテンツにある注入シグネチャ（InjectionSignature）の兆候またはポリシー違反を検査し、注入スキャン結果（InjectionScanResult）を生成します。」です。relation scans_for_signature だけで InjectionSignature にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: PatternScan 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 InjectionSignature。
expected_result.en: PatternScan retains its own type; validation must not promote it to InjectionSignature from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: PatternScan は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで InjectionSignature へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 scans_for_signature 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of scans_for_signature; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、scans_for_signature の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InjectionSignature（注入特征规范）由 safety-injection-defense 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由注入或投毒检测、指令冲突的安全判定、污点传播或针对该威胁的缓解决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InjectionSignature (injection signature specification) is owned by safety-injection-defense for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by injection or poisoning detection, security judgment of instruction conflict, taint propagation, or mitigation of that threat.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InjectionSignature（注入シグネチャ仕様）を safety-injection-defense が「対象の同一性が注入・汚染検出、指示競合の安全判断、taint propagation、または脅威緩和で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InjectionSignature 的 semantic kind 为 specification，主父或骨架为 scans_for_signature，并满足“semantic kind=specification；backbone=scans_for_signature；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms InjectionSignature has semantic kind specification, primary parent or backbone scans_for_signature, and invariants “semantic kind=specification; backbone=scans_for_signature; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は InjectionSignature の semantic kind が specification、主親または骨格が scans_for_signature であり、「semantic kind=specification、backbone=scans_for_signature、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: InjectionSignature 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for InjectionSignature were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: InjectionSignature の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 注入特征规范已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: injection signature specification was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 注入シグネチャ仕様は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 指令冲突是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它记录可信指令与不可信或低权限指令候选之间的安全相关冲突，包括受影响范围和解决结果。
short_definitions.en: As an information record, Instruction conflict is distinguished by the fact that it records a safety-relevant conflict between trusted instructions and untrusted or lower-authority instruction candidates, including affected scope and resolution.
short_definitions.ja: 情報記録に属する指示衝突は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、信頼済み指示と不信頼または低権限の指示候補との安全上の衝突を、影響範囲と解決結果とともに記録します。

definitions.zh: 指令冲突是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它记录可信指令与不可信或低权限指令候选之间的安全相关冲突，包括受影响范围和解决结果。
definitions.en: As an information record, Instruction conflict is distinguished by the fact that it records a safety-relevant conflict between trusted instructions and untrusted or lower-authority instruction candidates, including affected scope and resolution.

descriptions.zh: TrustedInstructionOverride 用作InstructionConflict的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 TrustedInstructionOverride 的已审查定义是“作为信息记录，可信指令覆盖由这一事实区分：它记录高权限指令、策略或批准在限定范围内覆盖不可信或低权限指令候选的事实。”。不能因 relation InstructionConflict-resolved_by-TrustedInstructionOverride 而把它归入InstructionConflict。
descriptions.en: TrustedInstructionOverride is the boundary contrast for InstructionConflict. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but TrustedInstructionOverride's reviewed definition is “Trusted instruction override belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records that a higher-authority instruction, policy, or approval overrides an untrusted or lower-authority instruction candidate for a bounded scope.”. relation InstructionConflict-resolved_by-TrustedInstructionOverride does not make it a InstructionConflict.
descriptions.ja: TrustedInstructionOverride は InstructionConflict の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、TrustedInstructionOverride の審査済み定義は「信頼済み指示上書きは情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、高権限の指示、ポリシー、承認が限定された範囲で不信頼または低権限の指示候補を上書きしたことを記録します。」です。relation InstructionConflict-resolved_by-TrustedInstructionOverride だけで InstructionConflict にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: TrustedInstructionOverride 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 InstructionConflict。
expected_result.en: TrustedInstructionOverride retains its own type; validation must not promote it to InstructionConflict from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: TrustedInstructionOverride は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで InstructionConflict へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 InstructionConflict-resolved_by-TrustedInstructionOverride 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of InstructionConflict-resolved_by-TrustedInstructionOverride; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、InstructionConflict-resolved_by-TrustedInstructionOverride の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。
